instructions: Wrap each element listed below with <AIAssistWrapper id="..."> in the specified file. Import AIAssistWrapper from '@/components/ai-assist-wrapper'. For server components (no 'use client'), convert to client component by adding 'use client' at top OR wrap only the parts that need it. The component already exists at components/ai-assist-wrapper.tsx. All MP3 files already exist in public/audio/ai-assist/. The existing 8 phase content pages already have wrappers - do NOT touch those files.

app/page.tsx.note: Server component - needs 'use client' or extract client wrapper. Simplest: create a new client component app/home-content.tsx that receives props and wraps elements.

wrappers.target: The <section> containing the h1 'NOA microTESE Prediction Dashboard' and description paragraph
First StatCard (Patient Cohort, 2413)
Second StatCard (Features, 73)
Third StatCard (Best Model CatBoost, AUC 0.8306)
Fourth StatCard (Figures count)
The <ArchitectureBanner /> component
The entire <section> containing the phases.map grid

app/architecture/page.tsx.note: Already 'use client'. Wrap the main container and key sections.

wrappers.target: The outermost container div of the architecture page
The orchestrator card/section (ORCHESTRATOR data)
The grid/section containing all agent cards
The intro banner div with 'Agent Introduction' and the quote
The div containing all podcast section cards (space-y-3)
